tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Here are the chords for Money For Nothing one of my favorite song! Enjoy playing!
(the "/" means the separation during the different mesures.)

[Intro]

[tab]                               [ch]Gm9[/ch].. . . . . .slowly build w/drums until guitar riff. . .
